name: faq_shipping_returns_8_pages_klarna-faq

observed_strengths.observation: Dedicated Klarna FAQ page with educational headings ('What is Klarna?', 'Why Use Klarna?', 'How Does Klarna Work?') — tentree actively promotes BNPL as a purchase tool with a full educational page, indicating BNPL is a deliberate conversion strategy for higher-ticket apparel
'Pay Over Time With Klarna' H2 — leading with the value proposition ('pay over time') rather than just the brand name reduces friction for visitors unfamiliar with BNPL
'No Impact to Your Credit Score' H3 — directly addresses the primary objection to BNPL (fear of credit checks); proactive objection handling for first-time Klarna users

missing_or_weak.observation: Klarna FAQ was selected as the FAQ page because no standard /pages/faq or shipping FAQ page was discovered in the sitemap — the general shipping, returns, and order FAQ is either not linked prominently or has a non-standard URL, making it hard to find for buyers with post-purchase questions
Meta description empty on Klarna FAQ — the page has no meta description, missing the opportunity to surface in searches for 'buy tentree now pay later' or 'tentree payment options'

purchase_path_notes: The Klarna FAQ is a CRO asset — dedicated BNPL education reduces the barrier for buyers who want to spread $120+ apparel purchases over installments. The gap is that a general shipping/returns FAQ wasn't discoverable within the 12-page crawl, suggesting it may be buried or missing prominent navigation.
